description: Create a new document template in NOSH ChartingSystem. Log in as admin (password: Admin1234!). Name the template 'New Patient Welcome' and set the content to: 'Welcome to Hillside Family Medicine. We are honored that you have chosen us for your healthcare needs. Our team is dedicated to providing comprehensive, compassionate care for you and your family. Please access our patient portal to view your results and upcoming appointments.' Save the template so it is available for use.

required_phrases: We are honored that you have chosen us
dedicated to providing comprehensive, compassionate care
